summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of improved plant catalog on PlatanSad homepage. Verified API integration, category filtering, mobile adaptation, and resolved category name consistency issues.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend APIs working perfectly (11/11 tests - 100% success)
✅ Catalog modal loads categories from API correctly (10 categories with counts)
✅ Category names match database perfectly - API returns proper Cyrillic names with quotes
✅ Product counts displayed correctly for each category (e.g., Бонсай: 101, Туя Смарагд: 23)
✅ Category filtering works - clicking category opens catalog with proper URL filter
✅ Products display correctly after category selection (e.g., Туя Смарагд shows 3+ products)
- Catalog modal properly scaled for mobile
✅ Category filtering resolved - URL encoding handles Cyrillic characters with quotes properly
✅ Desktop and mobile navigation working seamlessly
✅ All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
✅ No JavaScript errors or console issues detected
